apiUsage.methodologyCopy: Usage metrics combine the admin dashboard response with the latest {count} search records because the documented admin API does not expose a dedicated usage analytics endpoint.

items.question: How does monitoring work?
items.answer: Our intelligent AI scans the entire web 24/7 without gaps based on your registered images. As soon as a similar image is discovered, it undergoes a detailed analysis and is recorded on your dashboard, with real-time alerts to help you take immediate action. For optimized data management, all discovered data is kept securely for 30 days.

items.question: What happens when I reach my cumulative discovery limit?
items.answer: Once the limit is exceeded, monitoring and alerts for new discoveries will be paused. To continue using the service without interruption, you can upgrade to a higher plan or wait until your limit resets on the next billing date. (The Premium plan offers unlimited access with no discovery limits!)

items.question: Can I change my plan in the middle of a subscription?
items.answer: Yes, you can change your plan at any time! When upgrading, you only pay the difference for the remaining period and can enjoy the expanded benefits immediately. Downgrades will take effect starting from the next billing cycle after the current one ends.

items.question: What happens if I cancel during an annual subscription?
items.answer: Even after canceling, you can continue to use all features normally until the end of your current pre-paid subscription period. Your subscription will simply not renew for the following year. However, since annual plans include a discount, mid-term refunds may be limited according to our Terms of Service.

items.question: What happens to my registered images if I delete my account?
items.answer: Upon account deletion, all registered images and monitoring data are immediately and permanently destroyed to protect your personal information and valuable creative works. Since deleted data cannot be recovered, we recommend downloading any necessary reports before closing your account.

referral.title: Do you have a referral code?
referral.description: Enter the code during sign-up to get an instant free trial.
